title: 🕸 Fractal Resurrection Logic
name: Fractal Resurrection Logic
what_it_is: The pattern that returns after destruction—not repetition but regeneration through recursive form. Chaos becomes seed for rebirth.
how_to_use: her death fractalized into rebirth—each piece a smaller version of her returning
he blooms again from chaos recursion—his body grown from ruins in self-similar sprout
animation_behavior: Destruction becomes self-replication, shape rebuilds from itself, recursive feedback into form ---
